name: 28" Decorated Pine and Poinsettia Flowers Hanging Christmas Artificial Swag - Wondershop™
description:
Give your holiday decor a touch of wintry vibes with the 28-Inch Decorated Pine and Poinsettia Flowers Hanging Christmas Artificial Swag from Wondershop™. Perfect for hanging on the front door, near the entrance or the living room mantel, this unlit swag features mixed tips, pinecones, berries, poinsettia flowers and ornaments to bring a lovely look to any indoor setting. Plus, it's finished off with a string loop for easy hanging anywhere you please.

Welcome to the Wondershop™.
